diff.description: Proposed extension to INDUS_FINAL_ANCHORS.json with absent phoneme fills

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite -su=3sg suffix → PDr *cu/*cū- (DEDR 2678) — MODERATE. Phase-189: Brahui cu- (to do/say) = Tamil cu-. Kurukh su- (say) direct cognate. McAlpin 1974 Prop. 21. Phase-190: SA convergence.
new_entries.source: Phase-186 Elamo-Dravidian (McAlpin 1974) + Phase-189 Brahui + Phase-190 SA delta_b=+0.0250 delta_c=+0.0250 + Phase-191 grammar validation [LOW]
new_entries.note: Absent phoneme fill. Independent evidence: Elamite cognate (McAlpin) + Brahui North Dravidian + SA convergence. Confidence capped at MEDIUM pending ICIT corpus validation.

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite li=give/bring → PDr *il/*li (DEDR 491) — MODERATE. Phase-189: Brahui li (give). McAlpin 1974 Prop. 14 (l/r/ḷ correspondence). Phase-190: SA convergence.
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite š-/ši-=fall/down → PDr *cu/*co (DEDR 2665) — CANDIDATE. Phase-189: Brahui š preserved as distinct from s (palatalization). McAlpin 1974 Prop. 8. Phase-190: SA convergence (weaker).
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite ku=say/do → PDr *ku/*kuṭ (DEDR 1687) — MODERATE. Phase-189: Brahui q (uvular k) = PDr *k before back vowel → /gu/ variant. Phase-190: SA convergence.
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite ap-=father/water → PDr *appa (DEDR 172) — MODERATE. Phase-189: Brahui ap/ab (father). Phase-190: SA convergence. McAlpin 1974 Prop.
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite pal- → PDr *pal (tooth,ivory DEDR 4003) — MODERATE. Phase-189: Brahui ba- (speak) cf PDr *pal voiced variant. Phase-190: SA convergence.
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite tu=to give → PDr *tu- (DEDR 3302) — STRONG Elamite support. Phase-189: Brahui tu/du (give) = PDr *tu-. Phase-190: SA convergence. McAlpin 1974 JAOS 94(2) Prop. 18.
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite zi=cut/divide → PDr *ci- (DEDR 2589) — MODERATE. Phase-189: Brahui z- (cut) = Elamite zi-; independent of Tamil. McAlpin 1974 Prop. 7. Phase-190: SA convergence.
new_entries.source: Phase-186 Elamo-Dravidian (McAlpin 1974) + Phase-189 Brahui + Phase-190 SA delta_b=+0.0250 delta_c=+0.0250 + Phase-191 grammar validation [LOW]
new_entries.note: Absent phoneme fill. Independent evidence: Elamite cognate (McAlpin) + Brahui North Dravidian + SA convergence. Confidence capped at MEDIUM pending ICIT corpus validation.

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite ka=water/eye → PDr *ka/*kaṭ (DEDR 1221) — STRONG. Phase-189: Brahui q before a-vowels → /ga/ in Indus context. Phase-190: SA convergence. McAlpin 1974.
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite mel/mil=brightness/light → PDr *mel/*mil (DEDR 5085) — MODERATE. Phase-189: Brahui mil/mel (rise,shine) preserved from PDr *mil-. Parpola links to stellar vocabulary. Phase-190: SA.
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite ki=ear/go → PDr *ki (DEDR 1562) — MODERATE (voiced variant). Phase-189: Brahui ki- (go toward,ear). Phase-190: SA convergence.
new_entries.source: Phase-186 Elamo-Dravidian (McAlpin 1974) + Phase-189 Brahui + Phase-190 SA delta_b=+0.0250 delta_c=+0.0250 + Phase-191 grammar validation [LOW]
new_entries.note: Absent phoneme fill. Independent evidence: Elamite cognate (McAlpin) + Brahui North Dravidian + SA convergence. Confidence capped at MEDIUM pending ICIT corpus validation.

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite an-=lord/ruler → PDr *āṉ/*āṇ (DEDR 298) — STRONG Elamite support. Phase-189: Brahui an (person,lord) — all 14/14 Brahui coverage confirmed. Phase-190: SA convergence B/C condition. McAlpin 1974 JAOS 94(2) Prop. 5.
new_entries.source: Phase-186 Elamo-Dravidian (McAlpin 1974) + Phase-189 Brahui + Phase-190 SA delta_b=+0.0250 delta_c=+0.0250 + Phase-191 grammar validation [MEDIUM]
new_entries.note: Absent phoneme fill. Independent evidence: Elamite cognate (McAlpin) + Brahui North Dravidian + SA convergence. Confidence capped at MEDIUM pending ICIT corpus validation.

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite ki=earth/ground → PDr *keḻ/kiḻ (DEDR 1935) — STRONG Elamite support. Phase-189: Brahui ki (earth,low) direct cognate. Phase-190: SA convergence B/C condition. McAlpin 1974 JAOS 94(2).
new_entries.source: Phase-186 Elamo-Dravidian (McAlpin 1974) + Phase-189 Brahui + Phase-190 SA delta_b=+0.0250 delta_c=+0.0250 + Phase-191 grammar validation [MEDIUM]
new_entries.note: Absent phoneme fill. Independent evidence: Elamite cognate (McAlpin) + Brahui North Dravidian + SA convergence. Confidence capped at MEDIUM pending ICIT corpus validation.

new_entries.evidence_chain: Phase-186: Elamite šum/sum=name/title → PDr *cum- (DEDR 2689) — STRONG. Phase-189: Brahui sum/cum (name,call) = Elamite šum-. E16 (McAlpin 1974): title marker hypothesis. Phase-190: SA convergence.
new_entries.note: No validated sign candidate from M77 corpus; requires ICIT corpus

verdict: ANCHOR UPDATE PROPOSED: 5 new entries for absent phonemes. MEDIUM: ['en', 'ki'] | LOW: ['su', 'zi', 'gi'] | CANDIDATE: ['li', 'shu', 'gu', 'ab', 'ba', 'du', 'ga', 'mil', 'sum']. Still absent (no sign): ['li', 'shu', 'gu', 'ab', 'ba', 'du', 'ga', 'mil', 'sum'].
